Unit 1 Project

Task: Create a simple interactive web game.

Design Choices: Used bright colors and clear fonts to improve readability and user experience.

What I Learned: Learned how to manipulate the DOM with JavaScript and style elements with CSS.

Sample Code:


function startGame() {
  alert("Welcome to Unit 1 Game!");
}
